summary: Iteration 148: Revenue-at-Risk Engine + Pastry/Module Loading Fixes - All 21 backend tests passed (100%). Frontend verified: EchoAurium GM panel shows revenue-at-risk tile ($15,706), Pattern Intelligence panel shows revenue-at-risk drill-down with by_kind chips and sorted rows. Pastry/Echo Canvas module now loads correctly after cache clear (was showing 'Canvas Studio editor could not be loaded' due to stale Vite cache).
critical_code_review_comments: VERIFIED: GET /api/patterns/revenue-at-risk returns total_at_risk_usd=$15,705.95, by_kind breakdown (recurring_room, asset_cluster, repeat_guest), rows sorted by at_risk_usd desc
VERIFIED: GET /api/intelligence/aurium/gm includes revenue_at_risk_usd=$15,705.95 matching the revenue-at-risk endpoint
VERIFIED: EchoAurium GM panel hero has 5th tile (data-testid='revenue-at-risk') showing $15,706 in red
VERIFIED: Pattern Intelligence panel has 'Revenue at Risk · 14d horizon' section (data-testid='revenue-at-risk-panel') with by_kind chips and drill-down rows
VERIFIED: Pastry > Echo Canvas loads correctly with Tools palette, AI panel, Cake Builder tab, Templates tab
VERIFIED: REGRESSION - iter147 assign/dismiss/dismissals/preventive WO/team_notifications all working
NOTE: Vite cache issue caused 'Canvas Studio editor could not be loaded' error - resolved by touching preset-storage.ts to invalidate cache

verified_features.REVENUE_AT_RISK_endpoint: PASS - GET /api/patterns/revenue-at-risk returns correct structure with total_at_risk_usd, by_kind, rows, count, horizon_days, window_days, ts
verified_features.REVENUE_AT_RISK_by_kind_keys: PASS - by_kind keys are from {recurring_room, repeat_guest, asset_cluster, outlet_drift}
verified_features.REVENUE_AT_RISK_rows_structure: PASS - Each row has target, at_risk_usd, kind fields
verified_features.REVENUE_AT_RISK_rows_sorted: PASS - Rows sorted by at_risk_usd descending
verified_features.AURIUM_GM_revenue_at_risk_matches: PASS - revenue_at_risk_usd matches revenue-at-risk endpoint within 5% tolerance
verified_features.FRONTEND_aurium_gm_rar_tile: PASS - Revenue-at-risk tile (data-testid='revenue-at-risk') shows $15,706 in red
verified_features.FRONTEND_pattern_intel_rar_panel: PASS - Revenue-at-risk panel (data-testid='revenue-at-risk-panel') with by_kind chips and drill-down rows
verified_features.FRONTEND_pastry_echo_canvas: PASS - Pastry > Echo Canvas loads with Tools palette, AI panel, Cake Builder, Templates tabs
verified_features.REGRESSION_stratus_team_notifications: PASS - stratus creates team_notifications for HIGH-priority plans

seed_data_creation: Used existing demo data - revenue-at-risk returns $15,705.95 for 44 pattern rows
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 148 adds Revenue-at-Risk engine: (1) GET /api/patterns/revenue-at-risk?days=30&horizon_days=14 returns single-number revenue-at-risk across all open pattern signals plus drill-down rows sorted by at_risk_usd desc, (2) GET /api/intelligence/aurium/gm now includes revenue_at_risk_usd field, (3) EchoAurium GM panel hero has 5th tile (data-testid='revenue-at-risk') showing $USD amount, clicking opens Pattern Intelligence panel, (4) Pattern Intelligence panel has 'Revenue at Risk · 14d horizon' section (data-testid='revenue-at-risk-panel') with by_kind chips and drill-down rows. Also fixed Pastry/Echo Canvas loading issue caused by minified files with line-comments swallowing code - 185 files had missing React hook imports fixed. Vite cache may need to be cleared if 'Canvas Studio editor could not be loaded' error appears.
